_note: Centroid + bbox in WGS84 from ULDK srid=4326. Cesium ECEF Cartesian3 at h=0; runtime should use Cesium.Cartesian3.fromDegrees(lng,lat,terrainHeight). Edge lengths in meters give plot dimensions. Front azimuth: pick edge facing road (south-facing per terrain slope from NMT). Area diff vs declared (850 m^2) triggers admin review (>5% per F1 cross-validation rule).
